ideation: This animation sequence will show the robot gesturing towards a shallow pan of food, as if presenting or offering it.  The movement will be a smooth arc of the right arm, ending in a presentation pose. The left arm will remain mostly still for contrast and balance.  I'll use a three-frame sequence for simplicity and clarity. Frame 1: The robot's arms are at rest. Frame 2: The right arm starts to move forward and upward, palm open and facing downward. Frame 3: The right arm is fully extended, palm open and facing downward, hovering over the imaginary pan of food.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, ready to present
right arm begins to lift and extend forward
right arm presents the food, palm down
